CustomMetadata.label: AGA-002 - Agentforce accessible to all user profiles

values.value: Agentforce accessible to all user profiles
The Einstein Copilot or Agentforce permission set is assigned to all or most standard users with no profile-based restriction. The AI agent is available to the entire user population.

Unrestricted Copilot access means every standard user can query the AI with prompts that surface records they may not normally see via the UI. AI responses can bypass sharing context in some configurations.
Assign the Einstein Copilot permission set only to specific users or profiles who have a documented business need. Review the data access scope configured for each agent topic.
